name: Confectioners Sugar Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the powdered sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
2. Add the melted chocolate and vanilla, beating well.
3. Add the eggs and beat in the flour.
4. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
5. Grease and flour a 9x13 inch pan.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes.
8. Cool, then cut. Do not overbake.
